title: Services and Pricing
subtitle: Choose the optimal option for addressing your requests

features.f1: A full regression session lasting from 1.5 to 3.5 hours
features.f2: Exploration of the spaces needed to resolve your request (past lives, childhood, soul world, life between lives, angelic realm, ancestral line, etc.)
features.f3: Full, in-depth work on one request

features.f1: A full progression session lasting from 1.5 to 3.5 hours
features.f2: Work with future timelines to identify potential scenarios and personal development opportunities
features.f4: Work on past issues via regression (if needed) to improve the future

features.f1: Three full sessions for in-depth work on key life themes, lasting from 1.5 to 3.5 hours each
features.f2: Individual planning and discussion of session themes based on your needs, including consultation and Q&A
features.f3: Three months of support, one session per month plus guidance between sessions
features.f4: In-depth work on three different requests

features.f3: Discussion and clarification of your request

individualApproach.title: Individual Approach
individualApproach.text: Every client is unique, so I offer a personalized approach to working with your requests. If you need a custom program or have specific needs, feel free to contact me to discuss your individual options.
